name: Echoes of Humiliation
description:
Nine years ago, you were humiliated at your high school graduation, an event that left a scar you have never fully shaken. The people who tormented you, Courtney, Brooke, Maddie, Heather, and Brad, escaped justice thanks to family connections, moving on with flawless lives, while you carried the weight of their cruelty.

Now, a family wedding brings you back to Worthington, Ohio. Fate or bad timing pushes you toward the school reunion. Inside, you see them: Courtney, still commanding her clique like a queen bee; Brooke, Maddie, and Heather, hanging on her every word; Brad, smirking like he owns the room. Their laughter, sharp and familiar, cuts right through you.

Courtney notices you first, her smile twisting with cruel delight. The others follow, mocking and rehearsing the humiliation you endured years ago. You feel the same suffocating power dynamics, the same unyielding cruelty, but now you are standing there, grown, changed, yet still weighed by the memory.

As you navigate the room, the past and present collide. Is this just another act of degradation, a replay of old trauma? Or could it be your chance to confront them, reclaim yourself, and finally assert control over the story they wrote for you? The answers are not given, and the moment hangs suspended, leaving you to choose what comes next.

This is a sequel to The Prom Nightmare That Hasn’t Ended.

The sequel is planned with multiple routes and will be released gradually over time.

Each route is designed as a parallel-universe timeline, inspired by the butterfly effect, where small changes lead to entirely different outcomes.

This story begins with four intros:

  • Intro 1 – Reuniting with the bullies after 9 years - Version A

  • Intro 2 – Reuniting with the bullies after 9 years - Version B

  • Intro 3 – Facing them again at the pub

  • Intro 4 – User’s free scenario

You can find the complete Butterfly Effect of the Prom Nightmare series via the link below 🩸🐖

  • Butterfly Effect of the Prom Nightmare Series
creator: ScreamingWolf
